title: Samsung Galaxy A36, A56 specifications leaked ahead of launch, price range tipped
snippet: Samsung's Galaxy A37 and A57 could launch soon and could feature a triple rear camera setup and 6.7-inch displays. The A37 could be 7.4mm thick, while the A57 could be slimmer at 6.9mm.&nbsp;

title: Nothing Phone 4a vs Motorola Edge 70 Fusion: India price, specs, battery and more compared
snippet: Motorola and Nothing compete in the mid-range segment with their new phones. The Motorola Edge 70 Fusion offers better battery life, durability, and display, while the Nothing Phone 4a focuses on design and camera versatility.&nbsp;

title: Realme C83 5G with 7,000mAh battery and Dimensity 6300 SoC launched in india, price starts at  ₹13,499
snippet: Realme C83 5G is launched in India featuring a 7000mAh battery, 6.7-inch LCD display, and MediaTek Dimensity 6300 processor. The phone starts at a price of  ₹13,499.

title: Motorola Edge 70 Fusion with 7,000mAh battery, Snapdragon 7s Gen 4 SoC launched in India: Price, specs and more
snippet: Motorola Edge 70 Fusion with 6.78-inch AMOLED display, Snapdragon 7s Gen 4 processor, and a 7000mAh battery has been launched in India. The phone starts at a price of  ₹ ₹26,999 and goes up to  ₹32,999 for the top end variant.

title: WhatsApp could soon offer a paid subscription tier with exclusive stickers and ringtones: Report
snippet: WhatsApp is reportedly developing a premium subscription plan called WhatsApp Plus. The new plan could offer features like customized app icon options, increased chat pinning, exclusive ringtones, and stickers.&nbsp;

title: Meta Ray-Bans may have exposed your most intimate moments: Here's what every owner must do immediately
snippet: Meta is facing scrutiny for its privacy policies regarding user data collection through devices like Ray-Ban Smart Glasses. Cybersecurity experts highlight loopholes that compromise data safety, urging users to disable unnecessary sharing and be vigilant about their recordings.

title: Nothing Phone 4a with Snapdragon 7s Gen 4 processor, Glyph Bar launched in India: Price, specs and more
snippet: Nothing has launched the Phone (4a), a mid-range smartphone featuring a 50MP periscope telephoto lens and a 6.78-inch AMOLED display. The phone offers a Snapdragon 7s Gen 4 processor, 12GB RAM, and a 5,400mAh battery, available in four colors via Flipkart.

title: Apple launches Mac Neo at  ₹69,900: Top features, specs and how it compares to MacBook Air
snippet: Apple's MacBook Neo is an entry-level laptop aimed at students, featuring a 13-inch Liquid Retina display, A18 Pro processor, and macOS Tahoe. It offers 16 hours of battery life, a 1080p FaceTime HD camera, and weighs 2.7 pounds, making it a competitive option against the MacBook Air and Pro.

title: MacBook price drop in 2026: Why buying the M3 and M4 models is a smart choice right now
snippet: Maximize your 2026 savings with our guide to the MacBook price crash. Learn why the M3 and M4 are now the smartest buys for your budget and how to avoid the new model price trap.

title: Nothing Phone 4a Launch Highlights: Nothing Phone 4a, Phone 4a Pro launched in India
snippet: Nothing Phone 4a Launch Highlights: Nothing has launched the Phone 4a, Phone 4a Pro in India alongside the new Headphone (a).

title: For OpenAI and Anthropic, the competition is deeply personal
snippet: OpenAI faces rising competition from rival startup Anthropic. Led by former OpenAI researcher Dario Amodei, Anthropic is rapidly gaining enterprise customers, boosting revenue projections and challenging OpenAI’s dominance amid growing rivalry and shifting fortunes in the global AI race.

title: Police probe ChatGPT search history in Surat temple death case
snippet: Two women in the 18-20 age group were found dead inside the bathroom of a temple in Gujarat's Surat city, with police on Saturday stating they had recovered anaesthesia injections from the site and that the duo had searched AI-powered conversational tool ChatGPT about "how to commit suicide".

title: Supreme Court's AI Committee: CJI Surya Kant unveils plans to boost India's justice system
snippet: The CJI stated that AI would be utilised to achieve speedy, affordable, and true justice, adding that the apex court's research centre had been rejuvenated to identify and address reasons behind the case backlog.

title: AI to play major role in tomorrow's warfare: CDS Anil Chauhan at Raisina Dialogue
snippet: Chief of Defence Staff General Anil Chauhan on Saturday said the world is at the cusp of a huge transformation where artificial intelligence and autonomous systems will influence future warfare.

title: Niti Aayog and Tata Electronics partner to accelerate India's electronics manufacturing growth
snippet: Niti Aayog, the central government's premier policy think tank, has signalled a strengthened commitment to transforming India into a global electronics powerhouse through strategic industry partnerships.

title: Language AI platform Bhashini merged with Kerala police' iCoPS; allows officers to prepare reports without typing
snippet: The central government's language-AI platform 'Bhashini' has been integrated with Kerala police' iCoPS system enabling officers to prepare reports and documents without having to type them out. The language AI has been merged with the Integrated Core Policing System (iCoPS) used by the Kerala police

title: AI a game-changer, Andhra to soon produce quantum computers for world: Chandrababu Naidu
snippet: Speaking at the 11th Raisina Dialogue here, Andhra Pradesh Chief Minister N Chandrababu Naidu said artificial intelligence (AI) would soon change the daily lives of people. Naidu also stressed the importance of the demographic dividend to defend Andhra Pradesh's decision to incentivise having more c

title: Solar Defence announces Rs 12,800 crore investment in robotics, drone and deep tech projects
snippet: Solar Group Chairman Satyanarayan Nuwal said the investment of Rs. 12,800 crore would be made in the next three to four years, even though the investment is to be made in the next 10 years as part of the Maharashtra government's Mega Project and Thrust policy.

title: Robots capable of manning borders in extreme temperature to be manufactured at Nagpur facility: CM Fadnavis
snippet: Robots capable of guarding Indian borders in temperatures as low as minus 40 degrees Celsius will be manufactured at the upcoming Robotics & UAV facility in MIHAN-SEZ, Chief Minister Devendra Fadnavis said on Saturday, citing the patrolling by Chinese bots in place of soldiers

title: This startup claims it can stop lightning and prevent catastrophic wildfires
snippet: On June 1, 2023, as a sweltering heat wave baked Quebec, thousands of lightning strikes flashed across the province, setting off more than 120 wildfires.
